name: ASRock A620M-HDV/M.2+ Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 1x M.2 Key E for WiFi - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C - Realtek GbE LAN
shortName: ASRock A620M-HDV/M.2+ Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe
description: Improved budget micro-ATX motherboard with AM5 socket, DDR5, and enhanced memory support.
